case_title: DONALD J HOWARD VS. VICTORIA COAD DR

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT COAD DR, VICTORIA
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOWARD, DONALD J AS TO DEFENDANT COAD DR, VICTORIA
REMARK: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

ORDER CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-04-2020 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JAN-06-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DONALD J. HOWARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VICTORIA COAD, DR. IS PRESENT VIA TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE: COURTCALL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY DEFENDANT COAD DR, VICTORIA
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-05-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DONALD J. HOWARD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DR. VICTORIA COAD IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A $3000 PAYMENT IN TWO SEPARATE PAYMENTS OF $1500 EACH: ONE TO THE PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY; THE SECOND TO THE PLAINTIFF'S HUSBAND'S ATTORNEY. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE AUG 5TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
